标题: BV blend wide-leg fleece casual pants! When Italian texture meets relaxed atmosphere - these BV blend wide-leg pants are the "king of atmosphere" in the autumn and winter wardrobe. The soft fleece fabric wraps around warmth without looking bulky; the high-waisted drawstring design and loose wide-leg cut fuse laziness and casualness on the legs. The woven drawstring is the finishing touch, subtly hiding BV's signature exquisite details. Whether paired with a hoodie or a short jacket, you can effortlessly achieve a sense of luxury. Sizes: XS-L XS: Waist 74, Hip 68, Length 106 S: Waist 78, Hip 70, Length 107 M: Waist 82, Hip 72, Length 108 L: Waist 84, Hip 74, Length 108

BV Washed Grey Ripple Fleece-lined Jeans combine the brand's exquisite tailoring craftsmanship with the retro texture of denim fabric. Featuring unique washed ripple patterns, soft denim texture, and warm fleece lining, these winter pants are both stylish and practical, making them a must-have for high-end denim enthusiasts. Made from 100% combed cotton, the soft denim fabric eliminates the traditional stiffness of denim, offering a soft and comfortable feel while retaining denim's structure. The fabric undergoes pre-washing treatment to prevent shrinking and color fading, giving it a delicate matte finish with a subtle sheen. The dual technique of hand stone wash and enzyme wash creates natural grey ripple textures on the pants, with varying shades and unique handcrafted patterns on each pair. The washed effect adds a vintage touch to the denim fabric, while the grey color scheme enhances versatility in styling. The inner fleece lining is soft and skin-friendly, providing warmth without causing sweating, and enhancing the fabric's drape for a smoother silhouette. The high-waisted wide-leg cut features a natural curve from the hips to the cuffs, flattering the legs and creating a relaxed fit. The loose fit of the cuffs strikes a balance between denim's coolness and everyday comfort. Sizes range from XS to L.

BV 2025SS Autumn/Winter Blended Fabric Fleece-Lined Wide-Leg Casual Pants.  
When Italian elegance meets relaxed vibes—these blended wide-leg pants are the ultimate autumn/winter wardrobe essential. The soft fleece lining keeps you warm without bulk. High-waist drawstring and flowing wide-leg cut combine comfort with effortless style.  
Khaki woven drawstring adds a subtle signature BV detail. Perfect with hoodies or cropped jackets for an effortlessly elevated look.  
At home, they feel like cozy lounge pants; outside, they’re a street-style staple, blending comfort and sophistication.

BV Thickened Fleece-Lined Custom Warm Brown Plaid Jeans

Crafted with BV’s expertise, these thickened fleece-lined jeans blend winter warmth with Italian elegance in every detail. The vintage brown plaid features a washed finish for a naturally worn texture, offering a subtle, high-end look. An elastic waistband with double drawstrings fits various waist sizes comfortably without tightness, adjustable for easy wear. The straight wide-leg cut falls naturally from hips to ankles, flattering the legs for a sleek, elongated silhouette and a relaxed autumn-winter vibe. The inner fleece uses fine brushed fabric to keep legs warm alone or layered under coats without bulk, balancing warmth and style. Metal buttons reinforce the waistband; slanted pockets provide hand warmth; precise stitching and vintage-washed texture add a relaxed retro feel.

Slimming winter pants that reshape comfort and elegance in knitwear.

Hidden back pleats add dimension to loose fit, concealing waist and belly.

BV 2025FW Autumn/Winter New Light Blue Washed Fleece-Lined Jeans for Men. Featuring 3D patchwork tailoring, loose wide-leg fit, and adjustable drawstring waist.  

Crafted from custom light blue washed denim cotton, the fabric feels soft and delicate like touching clouds, yet retains a structured firmness for shape. The interior fleece lining provides warmth and comfort, shielding you from cold weather.  

The semi-elastic waistband with internal drawstring ensures a comfortable fit for various body types. The unique 3D patchwork cut breaks traditional flat denim design, adding depth and enhancing leg lines for a longer, straighter look.  

The loose wide-leg silhouette is a current fashion trend, offering a relaxed, unrestrained style that balances comfort and modernity without tightness.

BV Metal Thread Black Wide-Leg Jeans

The ultimate understated luxury for autumn and winter. Made from 100% pure cotton denim with a vintage wash, featuring a soft, draping fit and a misty gray tone. The signature silver-gray metal thread runs from waist to hem, adding subtle edge and visually slimming the legs. Elastic waistband with metal button ensures comfort and refinement—no belt needed, no marks when sitting. Details include triangular stitching on back pockets, BV white label inside, and matte metal zipper teeth. Sizes XS-L.

BV Galaxy Fabric Multi-Piece Patchwork Paratrooper Pants – a rare find from a trusted source. The fabric is lightweight, breathable, yet drapes beautifully with a rich texture, perfectly matching all trendy sneakers. Different sizes offer distinct styles. Garments are garment-washed for a vintage look, showing varied sheens under different lighting. At night, the fabric sparkles like a starry galaxy, unique to the original order—hence the name Galaxy Fabric. By day, it exudes a retro, edgy vibe; by night, a luxurious, mysterious glow with galaxy-like sparkles. Combined with a perfect fit, these pants deliver all-day surprise and style. Sizes: XS-L.

BV Brown Linen-Blend Tencel Casual Shorts are a summer wardrobe essential. Made from linen-style Tencel fabric, they combine linen’s crisp texture with Tencel’s softness and breathability. The breathable, nano-technology fabric offers a cooling, air-conditioned feel. Smooth and drapey, they provide a relaxed silhouette. The elastic waistband with drawstring ensures easy wear and adjustable fit for various body types. Clean tailoring creates a simple, elegant shape that moves freely. A subtle "BV" embroidery on one side highlights the brand with refined detail. Perfect with a white tee for casual looks or paired with a stylish shirt for outings. Sizes XS-L.
